changeSet.author: kai
changeSet.comment: Create main table for order analytics
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS orders_analytics ( order_id UInt64, order_status Enum8('PAYMENT_PENDING' = 1, 'CONFIRMED' = 2, 'CANCELLED' = 3), total_amount Decimal(18, 2), user_id String, user_email String, item_count UInt16, event_time DateTime64(3, 'UTC'), processed_at DateTime DEFAULT now() ) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_time) ORDER BY (event_time, order_id);

changeSet.author: kai
changeSet.comment: Create table for user behavior event tracking
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_lifecycle ( user_id String, event_type Enum8('REGISTER' = 1, 'LOGIN' = 2, 'CARD_ADDED' = 3, 'DELETE' = 4), ip_address IPv4, user_agent String, event_time DateTime64(3, 'UTC') ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (event_time, user_id);

changeSet.author: kai
changeSet.comment: Create table for driver and service ratings
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings_analytics ( rating_id UUID, order_id UInt64, target_id String, score UInt8, comment String, event_time DateTime64(3, 'UTC') ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (target_id, event_time);

changeSet.author: kai
changeSet.comment: Create materialized view for real-time revenue dashboard
changeSet.sql:
-- Aggregate table CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hourly_revenue_mv ( hour DateTime, total_revenue AggregateFunction(sum, Decimal(18, 2)), order_count AggregateFunction(count, UInt64) ) ENGINE = AggregatingMergeTree() ORDER BY hour;
-- Materialized View worker CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW IF NOT EXISTS hourly_revenue_worker TO hourly_revenue_mv AS SELECT toStartOfHour(event_time) AS hour, sumState(total_amount) AS total_revenue, countState(order_id) AS order_count FROM orders_analytics GROUP BY hour;
